title: WE BUILD eInvoice Attestation
description: JSON Schema for the SD-JWT VC claims set of the eInvoice attestation (vct: eu.we-build:einvoice:1)

iss.description: Issuer identifier (the Supplier's issuing system / EBW). Section 2.5.

exp.description: Technical expiry timestamp of the attestation (NumericDate). Section 2.5.

status.description: Token Status List reference for revocation (metadata, distinct from the business `status` attribute below). Section 2.5 / Chapter 6.

idx.description: status_list_index: zero-based index into the status list bitstring.

uri.description: status_list_credential: URI of the Status List Credential.

cnf.description: Holder key-binding confirmation (proof of possession by the Supplier's EBW at issuance). Section 2.5.

jwk.description: JSON Web Key of the holder (Supplier's EBW).

cryptographically_bound_to.description: vct of the Supplier's EBWOID attestation on the same Wallet Unit to which this attestation is bound. RECOMMENDED. Section 2.6 / Chapter 4.

attestation_legal_category.description: Legal category of the attestation. For this rulebook profile the exact value SHALL be `non-qualified-EAA`. Section 2.1.

invoicePayloadHash.description: Hash of the canonicalized invoice payload; binds the attestation to the external EN 16931 / Peppol BIS invoice (IR-EI-03). Section 2.2. NOTE: canonicalization method and hash algorithm are OPEN pending WP4 confirmation; sha256 assumed here.

invoiceFormat.description: Identifier of the invoice representation/profile used for the payload. Code list, Section 2.8.

invoiceNumber.description: EN 16931 BT-1. Invoice identifier, unique for the Supplier within the duplicate-detection window (IR-EI-04). Section 2.2.

issueDate.description: EN 16931 BT-2. Invoice issue date (RFC 3339 full-date). Section 2.2.

sellerLegalRegistrationIdentifier.description: EN 16931 BT-30. Reference to the Supplier's Legal Person identity (EUCC/LPID). Section 2.2.

sellerRegistrationName.description: EN 16931 BT-27. Registered legal name of the Supplier. Section 2.2.

sellerVatIdentifier.description: EN 16931 BT-31. VAT/tax registration identifier of the Supplier. Section 2.2.

sellerCountry.description: EN 16931 BT-40. ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code of the Supplier. Section 2.2.

buyerLegalRegistrationIdentifier.description: EN 16931 BT-47. Reference to the Buyer's Legal Person identity (EUCC/LPID). Section 2.3.

buyerVatIdentifier.description: EN 16931 BT-48. VAT/tax registration identifier of the Buyer. Section 2.3.

buyerCountry.description: EN 16931 BT-55. ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code of the Buyer. Section 2.3.

BuyerElectronicAddress.description: EN 16931 BT-49. Address/endpoint identifier for delivery/receipt handling. Section 2.3.

amountDueForPayment.description: EN 16931 BT-115. Total payable amount. Section 2.2.

invoiceTotalVatAmount.description: EN 16931 BT-110. Total VAT amount for this invoice; SHALL equal the sum of taxSubtotal.taxAmount when taxSubtotal is present (IR-EI-07). Section 2.2.

InvoiceCurrencyCode.description: EN 16931 BT-5. ISO 4217 invoice currency code. Section 2.2.

taxSubtotal.description: EN 16931 BG-23. VAT breakdown, one entry per tax category/rate. Section 2.3/2.4.

paymentInstructions.description: EN 16931 BG-16. Payment-related information. Contains sensitive payment data; issuer MUST make selectively disclosable. Section 2.3/2.4/3.2.

evidenceReferences.description: References to supporting evidence items (e.g. purchase order, delivery note). Section 2.3/2.4.

invoiceLifecycleStatus.description: Business lifecycle status for corrections, cancellations and credit notes. If omitted, the lifecycle status SHALL be interpreted as `active`. Distinct from the registered `status` metadata claim used for Token Status List revocation. Sections 2.3, 2.8 and IR-EI-09.

precedingInvoiceReference.description: EN 16931 BT-25. Identifier of the original or preceding invoice. SHALL be present when invoiceLifecycleStatus is corrected, cancelled or credited; MAY be omitted when the lifecycle status is active or omitted. Section 2.4 and IR-EI-09.

monetaryString.description: Monetary amount carried as a string to preserve exact decimal representation.

taxCategoryCode.description: EN 16931 BT-118 / UNCL 5305 VAT category code (EN 16931-aligned subset). Section 2.8.

taxableAmount.description: EN 16931 BT-116. Sum of net amounts for this VAT category/rate.

taxAmount.description: EN 16931 BT-117. Total VAT calculated for this subtotal.

taxExemptionReasonCode.description: EN 16931 BT-121. Standardized VAT exemption reason code (optional within group).

paymentMeansCode.description: EN 16931 BT-81 / UNCL 4461. 30=Credit transfer, 48=Bank card, 49=Direct debit, 58=SEPA credit transfer. Section 2.8.

paymentMeansText.description: EN 16931 BT-82. Text description of the payment method (optional within group).

paymentAccountIdentifier.description: EN 16931 BT-84. Payment account identifier (IBAN or other bank account number).

paymentCardPAN.description: EN 16931 BT-87. Payment card PAN, masked or full (optional within group).

evidenceReferencesType.description: Type of the referenced supporting evidence item. Section 2.8.

evidenceInlinePdfBase64.description: Inline PDF evidence, BASE64-encoded (one of three supported evidence forms, Section 2.8).

evidenceInlineUblBase64.description: Inline UBL evidence, BASE64-encoded (one of three supported evidence forms, Section 2.8).

evidenceUri.description: Publicly accessible URI of the evidence item (must be public; no protected-URI auth mechanism is standardized). Section 2.8.

evidenceHash.description: Hash of the evidence item referenced by evidenceUri, for integrity binding (IR-EI-08).
